chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-301 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 819/2024 2. For orders on M.A. 820/2024 3. For hearing of main case 07.08.2024 Faqir Rehmatullah Hisbani advocate for petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. Through this petition petitioner seeks protection from hands of private respondents. It appears from the record that for the same relief the petitioner approached Justice of Peace and the same was dismissed while observing that the applicant has dispossessed the private respondent namely Ali Muhammad from his agricultural land and thereafter approached Justice of Peace for seeking protection and the order further reveals that Civil Suit No.80/2023 was decided in favour of the respondents. Under such circumstances, this petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed in limine along with pending application. JUDGE Ali Haider
